source: AdaDetectGPT Adaptive Detection of LLM-Generated Text with Statistical Guarantees.pdf
title: AdaDetectGPT: Adaptive Detection of LLM-Generated Text with Statistical Guarantees
summary: AdaDetectGPT adaptively learns a witness function from external data and provides statistical guarantees for controlling false negative rate in LLM-generated text detection.

source: DetectGPT Zero-Shot Machine-Generated Text Detection using Probability Curvature.pdf
title: DetectGPT: Zero-Shot Machine-Generated Text Detection using Probability Curvature
summary: DetectGPT detects machine-generated text by using the observation that model-generated passages tend to lie in regions of negative curvature of the model log probability function.
